servinfo.title: Fail-Safe Table
servinfo.ptxt: When any of the following DTCs is detected, ECM control enters the fail-safe mode as long as the failure condition associated with the DTC continues. The fail-safe mode is canceled when ECM detects normal condition.

entry.ptxt: “A” Camshaft Position Timing Over Advanced or System Performance
“B” Camshaft Position Timing Over Advanced or System Performance
Mass or Volume Air Flow “A” Circuit
Mass or Volume Air Flow “A” Circuit Range / Performance
ECM calculates MAF value from MAP sensor signal. If MAP sensor error is also present, ECM calculates MAF value from TP sensor signal.
Mass or Volume Air Flow Circuit Low
Mass or Volume Air Flow Circuit High
Manifold Absolute Pressure / Barometric Pressure Circuit Range / Performance
Manifold Absolute Pressure / Barometric Pressure Circuit Low
ECM calculates MAP value from TP sensor signal.
Manifold Absolute Pressure / Barometric Pressure Circuit High
Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit Low
ECM controls actuators assuming that intake air temperature is 20 °C (68 °F).
Intake Air Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit High
Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit Low

item.ptxt: ECM calculates ECT based on IAT sensor signal when cranking.
After engine starting, ECM calculates ECT based on MAF sensor signal.

entry.ptxt: Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor 1 Circuit High
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “A” Circuit Low
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “A” Circuit High
O2 Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected (Sensor 2)
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “B” Circuit Low
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “B” Circuit High

item.ptxt: ECM stops fuel injector control of faulty cylinder.

entry.ptxt: ECM calculates CKP signal from CMP sensor signal.
Crankshaft Position Sensor “A” Circuit Range / Performance
ECM stops intake CMP actuator control.
ECM stops exhaust CMP actuator control.
Evaporative Emission System Purge Control Valve Circuit

item.ptxt: ECM stops EVAP canister purge valve control.

entry.ptxt: Evaporative Emission System Purge Control Valve Circuit Low
Evaporative Emission System Purge Control Valve Circuit High
ECM stops A/C compressor relay control.
Brake Booster Pressure Sensor Circuit Low
ECM performs A/C cut-off control according to estimated brake booster pressure.
Brake Booster Pressure Sensor Circuit High
ECM limits throttle control and fuel injection.

item.ptxt: ECM cuts off fuel at specified engine speed.

entry.ptxt: A/C Clutch Relay Control Circuit Low
A/C Clutch Relay Control Circuit High
Generator Current Sensor Circuit Range / Performance
“A” Camshaft Position Actuator Control Circuit Low
ECM stops intake CMP actuator control.
“A” Camshaft Position Actuator Control Circuit High
“B” Camshaft Position Actuator Control Circuit Low
ECM stops exhaust CMP actuator control.
“B” Camshaft Position Actuator Control Circuit High
Throttle Actuator Control Motor Circuit / Open
ECM cuts off fuel at specified engine speed.
Throttle Actuator Control Motor Circuit Range / Performance
Throttle Actuator Control Throttle Body Range / Performance
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “D” Circuit Low
ECM lowers upper limit of throttle valve opening.
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “D” Circuit High
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “E” Circuit Low
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “E” Circuit High
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “A” / “B” Voltage Correlation
Throttle / Pedal Position Sensor / Switch “D” / “E” Voltage Correlation
ECM cuts off fuel at specified engine speed.
Throttle Actuator Control System - Idle Position Not Learned
ECM calculates barometric pressure from TP sensor signal.
O2 Sensor Signal Circuit Shorted to Heater Circuit (Sensor 1)
O2 Sensor Positive Current Control Circuit / Open (Sensor 1)
O2 Sensor Reference Voltage Circuit / Open (Sensor 1)
O2 Sensor Negative Current Control Circuit / Open (Sensor 1)
O2 Sensor Signal Biased / Stuck Rich (Sensor 2)
O2 Sensor Pumping Current Trim Circuit / Open (Sensor 1)
